---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see -->

## Module/Component
<!-- Which module would this feature affect? -->
- [ ] Module 1: Data Ingestion
- [ ] Module 2: Knowledge Graph
- [ ] Module 3: Reasoning Engine
- [ ] Module 4: Frontend Interface
- [ ] Shared Components
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build/Deploy System
- [ ] New Module/Component

## Problem Statement
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? -->
**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the solution you'd like -->
**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Describe alternatives you've considered -->
**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Cases
<!-- Describe specific use cases for this feature -->
1. **Use Case 1**: As a [user type], I want [functionality] so that [benefit]
2. **Use Case 2**: When [scenario], the system should [behavior]
3. **Use Case 3**: [Additional use cases]

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- Define what "done" looks like for this feature -->
- [ ] [Specific requirement 1]
- [ ] [Specific requirement 2]
- [ ] [Specific requirement 3]
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Tests written
- [ ] Performance requirements met

## Implementation Notes
<!-- Any thoughts on how this could be implemented -->

## Dependencies
<!-- Are there any dependencies or prerequisites? -->
- [ ] No dependencies
- [ ] Depends on: [list other issues/features]
- [ ] Requires: [external tools/libraries]

## Priority/Impact
<!-- How important is this feature? -->
- [ ] High - Critical for project success
- [ ] Medium - Important but not blocking
- [ ] Low - Nice to have enhancement

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, mockups, or examples -->

## Learning Opportunity (for interns)
<!-- How could this feature be a good learning experience? -->
- **Skills Developed**: [e.g., API design, database modeling, frontend components]
- **Complexity Level**: [e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced]
- **Estimated Effort**: [e.g., 1-2 days, 1 week, 2-3 weeks]
